title: Tender Leaf-Wrap-Steamed Portuguese Garlicky Wrap
description: A garlicky, glassy-jelly weeknight Portuguese dish featuring lemon zest, leaf-wrap-steam, and is fodmap-friendly. This dish is perfect for a quick and delicious dinner or lunch.
instructions: Prepare a cedar plank by soaking it in water for 30 minutes.
Slice the Portuguese sausage into thin rounds.
Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat and cook the sausage until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion, red bell pepper, garlic, salt, and black pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Wrap each slice of pita bread with a piece of parchment paper and place on the cedar plank.
Place the plank in the oven and cook for 10 minutes.
While the wrap is cooking, mix the chopped cilantro, lemon zest, and parsley in a small bowl.
To assemble the wrap, spread a layer of the cilantro-lemon mixture on the pita bread, followed by a piece of sausage, some onion and red bell pepper, and a sprinkle of cilantro.
